elements.title: a library of religion and science in Tennessee
elements.contents: ... that a library of religion and science in Tennessee (pictured) never opened to the public?

elements.title: the 2020 series finale
elements.contents: ... that the 2020 series finale of Star Wars: The Clone Wars brought back the actor who played Darth Maul in Phantom Menace in 1999 to perform a fight scene?

elements.title: siege of Panormus
elements.contents: ... that Byzantine archers hoisted at the ships' masts during the siege of Panormus were elevated above the city walls and caused its Gothic garrison to surrender?

elements.title: painted flowers just once in a major work
elements.contents: ... that Edward Hopper painted flowers just once in a major work, dismissing them as fit only for "lady painters"?

elements.title: Alda Risma
elements.contents: ... that teenage vocalist Alda Risma won Best Pop Female Solo Artist at the Indonesian Music Awards for her debut album?

elements.title: white Bronco chase
elements.contents: ... that Domino's reported what at the time was its biggest day of sales during O. J. Simpson's white Bronco chase?

elements.title: Frederick McAlpine
elements.contents: ... that Frederick McAlpine called his own party a "Pinocchio government"?

elements.title: Nik-O-Lok Company
elements.contents: ... that the Nik-O-Lok Company installed coin-operated locks on an estimated 40,000 toilet stalls before the Committee to End Pay Toilets in America got them banned?

elements.title: Christ Church
elements.contents: ... that children smoked their priest off his pulpit before Christ Church was completed?
